source.notes: Shared component registry compiled from the design-system page and React implementation. Tool templates decide where each component can be used.

observedStructure.logoSlot: 208x60, x=28, y=10, centered inside the header area
observedStructure.rule: This component reserves the game logo image area. It does not render a visible text title in the map template.

logoSrc.rule: User-provided game logo image. Do not invent or substitute a fake logo.

title.rule: Used only for accessibility/alt text if available; not rendered as visible title text in the map header.

observedStructure.templateInstance: x=252, y=102, w=12, h=586 inside Panel Content
observedStructure.track: 12px wide, background follows panel background #2C3134 in the map template
observedStructure.rule: Use as the visual scrollbar for the left filter list. It reflects the list scroll position; it does not define datasource fields.

visible.rule: Renderer may hide it when list content does not overflow.

thumbHeight.rule: Keep the same scroll behavior as the map component. Position and height should match the source page or observed template state for the current Wiki detail page.

typography.label: Tokenized Body/MD; use --type-font-family-primary, --type-size-200, --type-line-height-200. Prefer mobile-specific type token when present.

disabled.rule: When true, render state=Disabled and do not open DropdownCard. Renderer may also disable Select when the datasource has only one map and uiRules.singleMapSelect requests disabled behavior.

states.disabled: background #2C3134, stroke #43484B, text #ECEEF0, arrow #696E72; no dropdown interaction

observedStructure.mobile: 343x42 in BottomSheet, x=16, y=28, background var(--color-bg-soft), stroke var(--color-stroke-sub)

typography.input: Tokenized Body/MD; use --type-font-family-primary, --type-size-200, --type-line-height-200. Prefer mobile-specific type token when present.
typography.placeholder: Default color #AEB4B8; hover color #ECEEF0; active text color #FFFFFF.

states.active: opacity 80%, background #2C3134, 1px #DCB325 stroke, empty focused input, clear icon hidden
states.filled: opacity 80%, background #2C3134, 1px #DCB325 stroke, filled input text, right close-circle-fill icon visible

observedStructure.mobile: 343x36 mobile search overlay at x=16, y=52 inside MapCollectionModal; not a BottomSheet child and not clipped by BottomSheet height.
observedStructure.mobileFocused: Search-focused state keeps SearchBar overlay x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36 while BottomSheet is expanded to x=0, y=68, w=375, h=652; footer omitted in observed state.
observedStructure.mobileCollapsed: In the fully collapsed mobile sheet state, SearchBar remains as MapCollectionModal overlay at x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; do not move it into the 100px BottomSheet.
observedStructure.mobileMarkerSelected: When a marker is selected, SearchBar remains visible as MapCollectionModal overlay at x=16, y=52, w=343, h=36; BottomSheet is hidden and Map.PopupDescribeCard appears at x=16, y=602, w=343, h=86.

value.rule: In Wiki shell usage, this is the global Wiki search query across all Wiki categories and detail entries.

onClear.rule: Clear button appears only when value is non-empty.

interactionState.rule: Mirrors Figma interactionState variants; disabled may also be derived from the disabled prop.

typography.label: Tokenized Body/MD, 14px/20px or mobile-specific text token when present

count.rule: required for child/item rows when source provides counts; parent rows do not need count

observedStructure.mobile: 343x36 row in SheetItemList; child rows use 32px left padding, optional 20px icon, optional count badge.

widthBehavior.rule: When used as Form.Select dropdown content, width must match the Select trigger width.

selected.rule: Selected option shows a right-side check-line icon.

props.rule: Only render between expanded DropdownItem content and the next parent item in the sidebar.

label.rule: Render only approved badge text from datasource or routing context. Do not invent placeholder labels.

tone.rule: Use source-provided tag type when available. For Wiki attribute tags, assign the same tone to the same tag class and a different stable tone to different tag classes when source colors are not provided.

observedStructure.mobile: count badge at row end, uses --color-bg-alpha-weak and Label/MD tokens

state.rule: Used by preview and visual-state rendering; runtime interaction may also use CSS pseudo states and disabled.

observedStructure.mobileSearchFocused: Footer/button may be omitted in MobileMapSearchFocusedScreen while search is focused.
observedStructure.mobileMarkerSelected: Footer/button and BottomSheet are hidden while selected marker detail card is open.

children.rule: When provided, replace the default TopBar content.

items.rule: Global primary Wiki navigation. Items correspond to top-level Wiki categories with content and should route to the matching first-level category or section.

typography.label: Body/SM, 12px/18px, regular; active text uses var(--color-primary-base), default text uses var(--color-text-weak).

children.rule: Visible tab label for a second-level Wiki navigation branch.

state.rule: Active tab represents the selected second-level branch. Do not use Nav.SecondaryTab for the global first-level top navigation; use Nav.TopBar there.

observedStructure.rule: Vertical local navigation used when a selected second-level tab contains real third-level groups or when a long detail page needs section anchors. In the multi-level secondary template it sits left of the card list and has a right divider, but it remains optional when the source page has only second-level navigation.

items.rule: For secondary multi-level pages, items are third-level groups under the active SecondaryTab only when those groups exist in the source page. For detail pages, items are section anchors. Exactly one item should resolve to active at render time.

activeId.rule: Controlled selected item id. When provided, renderer owns the active state and Nav.Navigate only emits onActiveChange.

defaultActiveId.rule: Initial selected item id for uncontrolled usage. If omitted, use the first item marked state=active, otherwise the first item.

onActiveChange.rule: Called with the clicked item id. In uncontrolled usage, clicking updates the internal active item and clears active styling from all other items.

state.rule: Item-level visual state. If an item id matches activeId or internal selected id, active wins. Other items with state=active are normalized to default so multiple active items cannot render at once.

observedStructure.rule: This card is the top-level Wiki category entry on the home page. The circular preview slots summarize up to the first three items of the linked secondary page in display order, and the trailing count shows the total number of items contained by that category. Hide the whole card when the total item count is 0.

imageSrc.rule: Compatibility fallback only. New Wiki mappings should populate avatarSrcs from linked secondary-page items; use imageSrc only when a legacy caller has one approved category-level image and no avatarSrcs.

avatarSrcs.rule: Provide up to three preview asset URLs derived from the first three items of the linked secondary page in display order. Each item may use an icon or image; when both exist, use icon first. Render the assets at the circular preview size. Do not pad with invented assets when fewer than three items exist.

countLabel.rule: Display the total item count contained by the category or linked secondary page, not the number of preview avatars currently shown. If the total count is 0, the renderer should omit this CategoryCard.

state.rule: When state=hover or the user pointer hovers the card, render the card with the hover background and a visible 1px stroke using the category-card hover stroke token. The default state reserves the border space with a transparent stroke so the card size does not shift.

items.rule: Use only on the final detail page, where the current level has no further subcategory page. The number of items equals the page hierarchy, and every breadcrumb item is clickable to its target page.

observedStructure.rule: Wiki list/detail describe card. Use it when the source entry has richer title, description, image, badge, or meta/attribute content than Game.ShowCard can fully express. This is separate from the map popup detail card.
observedStructure.lgNoAttributesRule: For size=lg with showAttributes=false, the card height must adapt to rendered content instead of keeping the full LG fixed height reserved for the attributes row.

showAttributes.rule: When false, do not render the attribute/meta row. For size=lg, the overall card height should adapt to title, description, badge, and image content.

page.rule: Current page comes from route, query state, or renderer state. Do not use preview defaults in generated output.

totalPages.rule: Total page count must come from backend or standardized datasource pagination metadata.

observedStructure.rule: ShowCard is a compact list/detail summary card. Use the right arrow only when the represented item has a next page, next hierarchy level, target route, or explicit clickable drill-down. The subtitle/description region is height-adaptive and clamps to two visible lines; full text must be exposed through Base.ToolTip on text hover when truncation is possible.

description.rule: Render as subtitle/body text. Show at most two visible lines and truncate overflow. Preserve the full string and wrap the truncated visible text with Base.ToolTip so hover shows the complete description.

progress.rule: Required only for variant=process. Do not render fabricated progress defaults in final output.

variant.rule: Use label when title, description, image, and optional badge fully express the source entry. Use process only when the source entry has a real progress value.

targetRoute.rule: Route to the next page or detail level. Presence of a real targetRoute implies the right arrow should be shown unless showRightIcon is explicitly false.

hasNextLevel.rule: Set false when the represented item is terminal and cannot drill down. When false, hide the right arrow even if the card remains selectable for local state.

showRightIcon.rule: Explicit visual override for the right arrow. Default compatibility behavior shows the arrow when neither targetRoute nor hasNextLevel is supplied; final Wiki mappings should set hasNextLevel or targetRoute to avoid ambiguity.

observedStructure.rule: Use together with Game.ProgressBar when source data contains a real progress-like numeric value and label. Do not infer progress from unrelated text.

Use for structured detail content when source sections match one of the supported structures: title/description, features, infoItems, statusBadges, structured tableRows/table, or an approved media/aside block. Do not force unstructured content into this component when the source shape does not match.

observedUse: any component text that is intentionally truncated and needs hover full-text disclosure

observedStructure.rule: Text hover disclosure bubble for truncated content only. Do not use this component for map markers; Map.MapTip remains the map point marker.
observedStructure.trigger: Wrap the visible truncated text node. The trigger keeps its original layout and text clamp rules.
observedStructure.bubble: Background color/bg/weak, radius lg, horizontal padding 12px, vertical padding 4px, Body/MD 14px/20px text in color/text/strong, regular-small white drop shadow.
observedStructure.tail: 12x6 triangle tail attached to the bubble edge. Supported directions place the tail at TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, Left, or Right.
observedStructure.behavior: Hidden by default. Show on mouse hover over the wrapped text and on keyboard focus of the parent interactive card when applicable. The bubble is non-interactive and must not affect layout size.

content.rule: Must contain the complete text, not the visually truncated string.

children.rule: Keep the original text component and clamp/ellipsis styles inside ToolTip.

placement.rule: Choose a direction that keeps the bubble inside the current page/card viewport. ShowCard descriptions use TopLeft by default.

observedStructure.positioning: x/y coordinates anchor the bottom-center tail tip to the map point inside the pannable and zoomable map coordinate system.
observedStructure.zoomRule: MapTip marker visual size stays constant during map zoom; the map canvas renderer recalculates screen x/y from map coordinates and zoom.
observedStructure.rule: This component represents a map point marker, not a visible text bubble. Use Base.ToolTip for truncated text hover disclosure.
observedStructure.layerRule: MapTip markers must stay below Map.PopupDescribeCard when they overlap; PopupDescribeCard is the active map detail surface.
observedStructure.mobile: Default marker 32x38 in default/collapsed/expanded/search states; selected marker may be 40x46 at x=163,y=315 in MobileMapMarkerSelectedScreen.

content.rule: Used as point label/accessibility text and short point info; not rendered as visible text inside MapTip.

icon.rule: Use point/category icon when datasource provides one; otherwise renderer may use a neutral map marker icon.

selected.rule: When true, renderer may use the observed selected marker visual state while preserving map-coordinate anchoring.

observedStructure.layoutRule: When imageSrc is absent, card height must adapt to title and description content instead of keeping the full image-card height.
observedStructure.closeButton: Top-right close button default state has transparent background; hover/focus state shows the white alpha background.
observedStructure.noMediaTitleRow: When imageSrc and description are both absent, title and close button must align on the same visual row; close top offset is adjusted only for the no-image state.
observedStructure.layerRule: DescribeCard must render above MapTip markers in map.canvas.
observedStructure.mobileRule: Do not use the desktop fixed lower-right 280x266 position on mobile. Use mobile.map.detail when specified.
observedStructure.mobileSelected: 343x86 at x=16, y=602 in MobileMapMarkerSelectedScreen; render only for selected marker detail and hide BottomSheet while open.
observedStructure.mobileCloseRule: When the mobile detail card close action fires, clear selectedMarkerId and restore the previous BottomSheet state instead of staying in markerSelected.
